models.question: Which AI models can this agent use?
models.policyHelper: You decide which models this agent can run on. People with access pick their own model from the ones you allow.
models.anyDesc: People with access can run this agent on any available model.
models.pickedDesc: People with access can only use the models you allow below.
models.allowedEmpty: No models picked yet. Add models below.
models.allowedEmptyLab: No models picked from this lab yet.
models.readOnlyNote: Someone who manages this agent can change which models it can use.

integrations.unavailable: Integration limits are not available here.

allowlist.question: Which apps can this agent use?
allowlist.policyHelper: You decide which apps this agent is allowed to use. People with access still connect their own accounts for each app you allow.
allowlist.anyDesc: People with access can connect this agent to any of 1000+ apps.
allowlist.pickedDesc: People with access can only use the apps you allow below.
allowlist.allowedEmpty: No apps picked yet. Add apps below.
allowlist.allowedEmptyCategory: No allowed apps in this category yet.
allowlist.readOnlyNote: Someone who manages this agent can change which apps it can use.

notAllowed.title: Not allowed for this agent
notAllowed.body: These apps are connected to your account, but this agent isn't allowed to use them. Ask your admin to enable them for this agent.
notAllowed.bodyManager: These apps are connected to your account, but this agent isn't allowed to use them. Enable them in Permissions.

org.title: Admin
org.subtitle: Manage your team, activity, usage, and billing in one place.

agentDetail.subtitle: What this agent is allowed to use.
agentDetail.managerOnly: Only this agent's Managers can change its access.

rows.people: Invite teammates, set roles, remove members.
rows.activity: What happened in this workspace, newest first.
rows.usage: How much each agent and person is messaging.

permissions.title: Permissions
permissions.subtitle: Pick an agent to manage who can use it and what it can use.

agentPeople.readOnlyHint: Someone who manages this agent can change who has access.
agentPeople.viewerOnly: You can use this agent. Someone who manages it can change who has access.

empty.title: No people yet
empty.body: Invite teammates from the Admin page to manage their access here.

share.title: Share {{name}}
share.subtitle: Choose who can use this agent.
share.viewSubtitle: These people can use this shared agent.
share.sectionHelper: Add teammates who can use this agent, and pick who can manage it.

empty.title: No one else has access yet
empty.body: Add a teammate to let them chat with this agent.

share.conversationNote: Everyone with access shares this agent's conversation.
share.chatNote: Shared agent. Everyone with access sees this conversation.
share.selfNote: Changing your own access here can remove your ability to manage this agent.
share.managerRequiresSeat: Only teammates with a Manager seat can manage agents.

levels.managerHint: Can use and reconfigure this agent.
levels.userHint: Can chat with this agent, but not change it.

selfLockout.title: Change your own access?
selfLockout.description: You are about to remove your own ability to manage this agent. You may not be able to undo this yourself.

people.adminNotice: You can view your team. Only the owner can add or remove people.

add.title: Add someone
add.subtitle: Invite a teammate by email. If they don't have Houston yet, we'll send an invitation.
add.invited: Invitation sent to {{email}}. They'll join when they sign in.

roleHelp.user: Members use agents shared with them.

removeConfirm.title: Remove {{name}}?
removeConfirm.description: They'll lose access to every agent shared with them. You can add them again later.

activityTab.error: We couldn't load the activity feed.

empty.title: No activity yet
empty.body: Changes to your team, agents, and apps show up here.

empty.title: No usage yet
empty.body: Once your team starts chatting with agents, message counts show up here.

empty.title: Create your first agent
empty.body: Agents are the assistants your team shares. Create one to get started.

createTeam.title: Create a team
createTeam.description: Teams let you share agents and work together. You can invite people once it exists.

shareViaTeam.sectionHelper: This agent lives in your personal space. Move it into a team to share it with teammates.
shareViaTeam.title: Share {{name}} with a team

pick.subtitle: Pick a team to move this agent into, or create a new one.
pick.empty: You don't have a team yet. Create one to share this agent.
pick.failed: We couldn't create the team. Please try again.

confirm.body: {{agent}} will move to {{team}}. You and your teammates will find it there.
confirm.downtime: The agent restarts during the move, so it may be unavailable for a moment.

moving.heading: Moving {{agent}} to {{team}}
moving.body: This can take a moment. Please keep this window open.

switchFailed.body: Your agent moved to {{team}}, but we couldn't switch to that team. Try again to continue inviting.

moveFailed.unsupported_move: This agent can't be moved to that team.
moveFailed.unmovable_volume: This agent's storage can't be moved automatically yet. Contact support.
moveFailed.needs_upgrade: This team needs an upgrade before you can move agents into it.
moveFailed.unknown: Something went wrong during the move.
moveFailed.timeout: The move is taking longer than expected. It may still finish in the background. You can try again or close this.

invite.subtitle: {{agent}} is now in {{team}}. Invite people to use it with you.

moveResume.failed: {{agent}} could not finish moving to {{team}}. Houston will try again the next time it starts.

billing.unavailable: We couldn't load billing for this team.
billing.pickPlan: Choose a plan to add your whole team.
billing.askOwner: Only the owner can change billing. Ask them to upgrade your team.

degrade.owner: Your team's trial ended. Upgrade to keep everyone working.
degrade.member: Your team's trial ended. Ask your team's owner to upgrade.
degrade.writeBlockedBody: Your team's trial ended. Ask your team's owner to upgrade to make changes.
